name: square-hunter-bot
description: Binance Square Search & Filtering Agent on OpenClaw

scripts.start: mkdir -p ~/.openclaw/workspace && cp -f SOUL.md IDENTITY.md ~/.openclaw/workspace/ || true && openclaw models set groq/llama-3.3-70b-versatile && openclaw config set plugins.entries.telegram.enabled true && openclaw config set channels.telegram.enabled true && openclaw config set channels.telegram.allowFrom '["*"]' && openclaw config set channels.telegram.dmPolicy open && openclaw config set channels.telegram.botToken "$TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN" && NODE_OPTIONS='--dns-result-order=ipv4first' openclaw gateway run --allow-unconfigured
